category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an implementation of OpenAL's ALUT standard; official GitHub README says freealut is a free implementation of OpenAL's ALUT standard.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is freealut; official GitHub repository and README use freealut.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains build, support, linking, and directory documentation and lists the doc directory as ALUT documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository, and its README identifies the freealut library.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify OpenAL ALUT; GitHub language summary and README describe a portable library implemented in C.
